rationale: Section 11.434 governs late applications for school exemptions under Section 11.21, not the residence homestead exemption under Section 11.13(b). No operative text references the $140,000 amount or §11.13(b).
quote: The chief appraiser shall accept or deny an application for a school exemption under Section 11.21 after the filing deadline provided by Section 11.43 if the application is filed not later than December 31 of the fifth year after the year in which the taxes for which the exemption is claimed were imposed.
_note: No conflict identified. Section 11.434 references Section 11.21 school exemptions, not Section 11.13(b) residence homestead exemptions.
